items.name: month-contribution-heatmap
items.title: MonthContributionHeatmap
items.description: GitHub-style yearly contribution heatmap with multi-year, weekStart, and i18n support.

items.name: week-contribution-heatmap
items.title: WeekContributionHeatmap
items.description: Weekday × hour-of-day matrix with Sum row/column and independent colour scales.

items.name: date-contribution-heatmap
items.title: DateContributionHeatmap
items.description: Date × hour matrix for zooming into a narrow time window with daily Sum column.
